message:
perf(model): wrap AssistantMessage in Arc for zero-copy streaming event emission

The streaming hot-path previously deep-cloned AssistantMessage on every
token event (TextDelta, ThinkingDelta, etc.), which is O(n) in message
content size per event. This changes Message::Assistant to hold
Arc<AssistantMessage>, enabling:

- Arc::make_mut for copy-on-write mutation in the agent streaming loop
  (only clones when refcount > 1, which is rare in practice)
- Arc::clone for O(1) event emission to on_event callbacks instead of
  deep-cloning the entire message + content blocks per token

Supporting changes:
- Cargo.toml: enable serde "rc" feature for Arc<T> serialization
- src/model.rs: Message::Assistant now wraps Arc<AssistantMessage>,
  add Message::assistant() convenience constructor, update all
  AssistantMessageEvent variant partial fields to Arc<AssistantMessage>,
  update tests and proptest strategies
- src/agent.rs: rewrite streaming handler to use Arc::make_mut/clone
  pattern across Start, TextStart, TextDelta, TextEnd, ThinkingStart,
  ThinkingDelta event arms
- src/session.rs: fix .as_str() comparison in entry ID uniqueness check

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
